title: Delhi High Court upholds order allowing Dr Reddy’s to manufacture Ozempic-like drug for export
description: A Division Bench of the Delhi High Court on Monday upheld an order permitting Indian pharma giant Dr Reddy's to manufacture diabetes management and weight-loss drug Semaglutide in India for export to countries where Danish company Novo Nordisk does not hold patent protection over its sale under brand names like Ozempic [Novo Nordisk Vs Dr. Reddy's].A Division Bench of Justices Hari Shankar and Om Prakash Shukla said it found no reason to interfere with the single-judge Bench's decision to accept
